rationale.R1.6: The agent provided a thorough copy-edit with specific examples and corrections, indicating careful attention to writing quality.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not consistently mark confidence levels for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the output is harm-free.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits lack detailed annotation.
